prompt: Implement `reverseString(s: string): string` that returns the string reversed.
canonicalSolution: export function reverseString(s: string): string { return s.split('').reverse().join(''); }
test: assert(reverseString('hello')==='olleh'); assert(reverseString('')===''); assert(reverseString('a')==='a'); assert(reverseString('abcd')==='dcba'); assert(reverseString('racecar')==='racecar'); assert(reverseString('  hi')==='ih  ');
